events.comment: Firing a bullet, using hit scan, a method of using raycasting instead of a projectile
Picking the target that is first struck by the raycast when the player shoots
Changing the score and PopUpText based on the target that was picked
Starting the round and starting the target motion
If targets go beyond the below marker object, reposition them to the above marker
Starting the game timer when the round start object is shot
Lock point when clicked in to screen
